title: Michelo v Sampa and Anor (CCZ/A 35 of 2021) [2022] ZMCC 26 (21 October 2022)
issue_tags: proof to convincing clarity that corrupt/illegal practice committed by candidate or with candidate’s knowledge/consent or agent
linkage requirement; appellate standard for disturbing factual findings; substantial conformity doctrine
when electoral flaws do not warrant annulment.
outcome_detail: Appellant failed to prove electoral misconduct tied to the candidate or agents; appeal dismissed and election upheld
